description_long: This is a modern, angular desk with a distinctive L-shaped design, featuring a raised counter along the front and a slatted horizontal surface. The main body is composed of dark wood or laminate panels, contrasted by a lighter, smooth vertical panel on the front. The desk's left side extends outward, forming a partial enclosure that could serve as a privacy barrier or modesty panel. The top surface is wide and flat, suitable for placing office equipment or paperwork, while the raised counter provides an additional ledge for interaction or transaction. The construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic, making it suitable for professional or public-facing environments. There are no visible drawers, handles, or other interactive components beyond the main surfaces.
description: A modern L-shaped desk with a dark wood finish, raised counter, and slatted work surface, designed for professional or public use. The desk features clean lines and a sturdy, contemporary build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised counter, light-colored front panel, and the extended left side forming a partial enclosure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the slatted surface, with the raised counter visible along the top edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the slatted work surface and the open back, with the raised counter running along the front edge.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid side panel and the overhanging raised counter, with the slatted surface partially visible.
attribute_location: reception area or public office lobby
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long front with the raised counter and light-colored panel, while the left side forms a partial enclosure; the back is open for user access.
attribute_usage_context: reception counter or transaction desk in a public or office setting
